title: Dungeon master
description: A fun beta mod for creating dungeons that you and your friends can enjoy
body: This mod is a quite complex mod that I will make a tutorial for soon, the basic concept is that anyone can create a dungeon that runs off experience, you will be able to make traps and summon loot and mobs, then raiders can come and collect loot, if they die to traps, their experience will be consumed to fuel the dungeon. its a like a pitcher plant. adventurers are lured by loot and are consumed. This mod is survival freindly!
